name: Fallout: Life as a Vault Overseer
description: In the post-apocalyptic hellscape left behind after the Great War, you find yourself elected Overseer of a Vault. The Vault's citizens have lived in this glorified bunker for generations, dreaming of what the world must be like beyond its massive gear-shaped door. As Overseer, only you know what lies beyond it... And the truth of how unnatural your peoples' way of life really is.
creator: boobaczar
